requirements.text: Ontology of difference is implemented as Difference -> Information -> Causality -> Responsibility -> Verification -> Feedback -> Traceability.
Constitutional governance process is implemented upward from all regulated necessities.
Assertion and evidence classes are mandatory for significant claims.
Privacy, proportionality, emergency, correction, sanctions, revision and misuse-prevention gates are present.
No final pass without multicast, ontology, governance and traceability gates.
